About

Key Points
Business Overview:
[1]
[2]
Based in Kolhapur, MBL is a premier Indian manufacturer of critical engine components, including
bearings, bushes, and thrust washers
designed for high-stress, heavy-duty diesel environments. The company operates across three strategic segments:
Bimetal products, Alkop (aluminum die-casting), and Braking Systems.
